results.rendered_html:
vartamāna a. [vṛt-śānac]
1 Being, existing.
2 Living, being alive, contemporary; prathitayaśasāṃ bhāsakavisaumillakavimiśrādīnāṃ prabaṃdhānatikramya vartamānakaveḥ kālidāsasya kriyāyāṃ kathaṃ pariṣado bahumānaḥ  M. 1. 
3 Turning or
(pb) moving round, revolving.
4 Dwelling in.
— naḥ The present tense (in gram.); vartamānasāmīpye vartamānavadvā  P. III. 3. 131. 
— naṃ Presence.
